message:
feat(dlfcn): nativize dl_iterate_phdr and dladdr with membrane-gated fallbacks

Replace glibc host_delegate call-through for dl_iterate_phdr and dladdr
with native membrane-gated implementations. dl_iterate_phdr now returns
0 (no entries) as a safe phase-1 fallback instead of forwarding to the
host loader. dladdr validates its inputs and reports unavailability
through the standard dlerror channel.

Changes:
- Remove host_dl_iterate_phdr and host_dladdr delegate bindings
- Implement native dl_iterate_phdr that passes runtime policy checks and
  returns 0 entries
- Implement native dladdr with null-pointer validation and proper error
  reporting via set_dlerror
- Add ERR_OPERATION_UNAVAILABLE constant to dlfcn_core
- Add dlfcn_abi_test.rs with three test cases covering the native
  fallback behavior (zero return, null input error, unavailable error)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
